concerns.detail: Added insult telling a commenter to seek medical help, which is a pure personal attack unrelated to advising practices.
Inserted identifying information about a specific student (full name Ding Yufei) and their romantic relationship status (girlfriend of Geng Haoran), which is private personal information.
concerns.excerpt: 不就是ghr的npy吗？ding yufei 在pku赫赫有名

concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive accusation about an individual pretending to be an intern to whitewash their own record (sockpuppeting), which is a legitimate observation about conduct, while also removing contact info; this appears to suppress criticism rather than mere cleanup.
concerns.excerpt: 你在这里假装自己intern给自己硬洗
